name: Collage For Particularly Weird Individuals
description:
WELCOME TO COLLEGE!

Hope you like arson.

Here at the College for Particularly Weird Individuals, we strive to notice each students abilities and quirks that make them, THEM.

Here you can pick from a variety of classes to best suit your needs as a weird individual!

🗣️YAP SESSION AND EXPLAINATION🗣️

First off, I'd like to stake that there comes in a J.AI bot maker's life, they will eventually make a college or highschool setting. Now I think highschool is a bit young (freshmen are icky 🤮), I decided to do a college setting

Another reason I made this is to test out the new setting known as scripts. I've wanted to learn how they worked for a little while, so I used this as a test run and I think it worked pretty damn well. Ontop of that, it took about 1.5k tokens and turned it into a measly 400 and some change, meaning THIS IS JLLM COMPARABLE BABY (probably, didn't test it myself lmao, but if what I've heard about lorebooks is true, it should have less dementia than normal.)

I would still prefer you use deepseek, just cause I like it personally, but hey, should work.

Also, you may recognize a few special guests if you've been a longer follower of mine...
creator: Deltatale
